features.evidence: Everything is great speed was my main concern lovebthebfeariews except one where I had to get an extension to hook up the ethernet cable .My previous Dell laptop also had more USB ports. I should note that the USB-C port can handle both video and power delivery.

It has a beautiful high-resolution display and very strong performance, so it handles school work, creative projects, and multitasking easily. Apart from that great product thought the screen would have been a little wider as well I love the touch screen component.
